custom_lists.name: Upset Watch
custom_lists.description: System-managed list of teams flagged as potential upset candidates in upcoming games.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Offensive Efficiency
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Estimated points scored per 100 possessions, adjusted for opponent and tempo.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Defensive Efficiency
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Estimated points allowed per 100 possessions, adjusted for opponent and tempo.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Overall Power Rating
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Composite team strength rating combining offensive, defensive, and schedule factors.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Favorite Win Probability
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Model-estimated chance that the favored team wins the game.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Underdog Win Probability
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Model-estimated chance that the underdog team wins the game.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Payout Multiplier
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Simulated total payout multiple for a bet or parlay selection.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Team Rank
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Ordinal ranking position used for top-25 lists and standings.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Rank Change
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Net change in ranking position over a selected time window.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Biggest Rise
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Sort key highlighting teams with the largest positive ranking movement.

ranking_metric_definitions.name: Average Predicted Win Probability
ranking_metric_definitions.description: Average model-estimated win chance across a set of games in a time range.
